Wither.rules_text_template: This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.
tag_notes: Only tag if counter interaction matters.

Retrace.rules_text_template: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying its other costs.
Retrace.mechanic_summary: Graveyard casting enabled by discarding lands.
tag_notes: Strong synergy with lands and graveyard strategies.

Devour.rules_text_template: As this creature enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This creature enters with N +1/+1 counters on it for each creature sacrificed this way.
Devour.mechanic_summary: Consumes creatures to grow larger with +1/+1 counters.

Exalted.rules_text_template: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Exalted.mechanic_summary: Rewards attacking with a single creature.

Unearth.rules_text_template: {cost}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield.
tag_notes: Haste_enabler applies because the returned creature can attack immediately.

Cascade.rules_text_template: When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with lesser mana value. You may cast it without paying its mana cost.
Cascade.mechanic_summary: Chains into a free spell from the library.
tag_notes: Not card_draw, since cards are cast, not drawn.

Annihilator.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices N permanents.

Level Up.rules_text_template: {cost}: Put a level counter on this. This creature gains abilities based on its level.
Level Up.mechanic_summary: Mana sink that upgrades a creature over time.
tag_notes: Acts as a long-term investment engine.
Counters_payoff applies if scaling is meaningful.

Rebound.rules_text_template: If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Rebound.mechanic_summary: Automatically recasts the spell once on the next turn.
tag_notes: Not recursion in the traditional sense.

Umbra Armor.rules_text_template: If enchanted creature would be destroyed, instead remove all damage from it and destroy this Aura.
Umbra Armor.mechanic_summary: Protects a creature by sacrificing the Aura instead.

Infect.rules_text_template: This creature deals damage to players in the form of poison counters and to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.
Infect.mechanic_summary: Alternate damage system using poison counters and -1/-1 counters.
tag_notes: You may eventually want a dedicated poison/archetype tag.

Battle Cry.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
Battle Cry.mechanic_summary: Attack-triggered team-wide power boost for other attackers.
tag_notes: Can overlap with anthem, but is temporary and attack-based.

Living Weapon.rules_text_template: When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Germ creature token, then attach this to it.
Living Weapon.mechanic_summary: Creates a token and auto-equips it.
tag_notes: Provides immediate board presence for Equipment.

Undying.rules_text_template: When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Undying.mechanic_summary: Returns a creature to the battlefield once with a +1/+1 counter.
tag_notes: Mirror of persist but with +1/+1 counters.

Miracle.rules_text_template: You may reveal this card as you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn. When you do, you may cast it for its miracle cost.
Miracle.mechanic_summary: Allows casting a spell for a reduced cost when drawn at the right time.
tag_notes: Conditional cost reduction tied to draw timing.

Soulbond.rules_text_template: You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired as long as you control both.
Soulbond.mechanic_summary: Pairs creatures together for shared bonuses.
tag_notes: Tag based on granted abilities (evasion, protection, etc.).

Overload.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change 'target' to 'each'.
Overload.mechanic_summary: Upgrades a spell from single-target to mass effect.

Scavenge.rules_text_template: {cost}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to its power on target creature.
tag_notes: Acts as delayed value from graveyard.

Unleash.rules_text_template: You may have this creature enter with a +1/+1 counter on it. It can't block as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.
Unleash.mechanic_summary: Aggressive stat boost at the cost of blocking.
tag_notes: Not a counters engine by itself.

Cipher.rules_text_template: Then you may exile this spell encoded on a creature you control. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player, you may cast a copy of the encoded card.
Cipher.mechanic_summary: Creates repeatable spell casting tied to combat damage.
tag_notes: Repeatable value makes it an engine.

Evolve.rules_text_template: Whenever a creature enters under your control with greater power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
Evolve.mechanic_summary: Grows a creature based on larger creatures entering.
tag_notes: Not inherently go_tall unless built around.

Extort.rules_text_template: Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {W/B}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain that much life.
Extort.mechanic_summary: Converts spell casting into incremental life drain.

Fuse.rules_text_template: You may cast both halves of this split card from your hand.
Fuse.mechanic_summary: Allows casting both sides of a split card together.
tag_notes: Acts as an upgrade mode similar to entwine.

Bestow.rules_text_template: If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it’s not attached.
Bestow.mechanic_summary: Flexible creature/Aura hybrid that grants buffs.
tag_notes: Also functions as a creature if not attached.

Tribute.rules_text_template: As this creature enters, an opponent may put N +1/+1 counters on it. If they don’t, you get an alternate effect.
Tribute.mechanic_summary: Opponent chooses between counters or allowing an alternate effect.
tag_notes: Tag the alternate effect separately (removal, damage, etc.).

Dethrone.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks the player with the most life or tied for most life, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
tag_notes: Not a counters engine by itself.

Hidden Agenda.rules_text_template: As this conspiracy enters, secretly name a card. It affects cards with that name.
Hidden Agenda.mechanic_summary: Hidden naming mechanic affecting future cards.

Outlast.rules_text_template: {cost}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.
Outlast.mechanic_summary: Repeatable counter generation at sorcery speed.

Prowess.rules_text_template: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Prowess.mechanic_summary: Rewards noncreature spells with temporary combat boosts.

Dash.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste and is returned to your hand at end step.
tag_notes: Not recursion since it returns to hand immediately.

Exploit.rules_text_template: When this creature enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, you get an additional effect.

Menace.rules_text_template: This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.
Menace.mechanic_summary: Forces opponents to commit multiple blockers.
tag_notes: Only tag if the creature is a real offensive threat.

Renown.rules_text_template: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put N +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes renowned.
Renown.mechanic_summary: Rewards first successful combat damage with permanent growth.

Awaken.rules_text_template: If you cast this spell for its awaken cost, put N +1/+1 counters on target land you control. That land becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land.
Awaken.mechanic_summary: Turns lands into creatures with +1/+1 counters.

Devoid.mechanic_summary: Removes color identity from the card.
tag_notes: Not mechanically relevant for your taxonomy.

Ingest.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.
Ingest.mechanic_summary: Exiles cards from opponent's library on combat damage.
tag_notes: Not true mill (goes to exile), but functionally similar disruption.

Myriad.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks, create a token copy tapped and attacking each other opponent. Exile them at end of combat.
Myriad.mechanic_summary: Creates temporary attacking copies for each opponent.

Surge.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell for its surge cost if you or a teammate has cast another spell this turn.
Surge.mechanic_summary: Conditional cost reduction based on prior spell casting.

Skulk.rules_text_template: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
tag_notes: Only tag if it contributes to pressure.

Emerge.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.
Emerge.mechanic_summary: Sacrifice-based cost reduction for casting large creatures.

Escalate.rules_text_template: Pay the escalate cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.
Escalate.mechanic_summary: Allows selecting multiple modes by paying additional costs.

Melee.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each opponent you attacked this combat.
Melee.mechanic_summary: Scales combat stats based on number of opponents attacked.

Crew.rules_text_template: Tap any number of creatures you control with total power N or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.
Crew.mechanic_summary: Uses creatures to animate Vehicles into attackers.
tag_notes: Very similar resource pattern to convoke and waterbend.
Tag vehicle payoffs separately if needed.

Fabricate.rules_text_template: When this creature enters, choose one — put N +1/+1 counters on it or create N 1/1 Servo artifact creature tokens.
Fabricate.mechanic_summary: Flexible ETB choice between counters or tokens.
tag_notes: Supports both go_tall and go_wide depending on mode.

Partner.rules_text_template: You may have two commanders if both have partner.

Undaunted.rules_text_template: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent.
Undaunted.mechanic_summary: Cost reduction scaling with number of opponents.

Improvise.rules_text_template: Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap pays for {1}.
Improvise.mechanic_summary: Uses artifacts as a resource to reduce spell cost.

Aftermath.rules_text_template: You may cast this half of this split card from your graveyard, then exile it.
Aftermath.mechanic_summary: Graveyard casting of split card half.

Embalm.rules_text_template: {cost}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a white Zombie with no mana cost.
Embalm.mechanic_summary: Creates a token copy of a creature from the graveyard.

Eternalize.rules_text_template: {cost}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/4 black Zombie token copy of it.
Eternalize.mechanic_summary: Creates a larger token copy from graveyard.
tag_notes: Similar to embalm but standardized stats.

Afflict.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses N life.
tag_notes: Not true evasion but similar pressure.

Ascend.rules_text_template: If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.
Ascend.mechanic_summary: Grants a permanent game state bonus once a threshold is reached.

Assist.rules_text_template: Another player can pay up to {X} of this spell's cost.
Assist.mechanic_summary: Allows teammates to help pay for a spell.
tag_notes: Not useful for core gameplay taxonomy.

Jump-Start.rules_text_template: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a card in addition to paying its other costs. Then exile it.
Jump-Start.mechanic_summary: Graveyard casting enabled by discarding a card.
tag_notes: Very similar to flashback + discard synergy.
Strong in graveyard and spellslinger decks.

Mentor.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature with lesser power.

Afterlife.rules_text_template: When this creature dies, create N 1/1 white and black Spirit creature tokens with flying.

Riot.rules_text_template: This creature enters with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.
Riot.mechanic_summary: Flexible choice between speed or power.
tag_notes: Not a synergy engine by itself.

Spectacle.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell for its spectacle cost if an opponent lost life this turn.
Spectacle.mechanic_summary: Conditional cost reduction based on opponent life loss.

Escape.rules_text_template: You may cast this card from your graveyard by paying its escape cost and exiling other cards from your graveyard.
Escape.mechanic_summary: Repeatable graveyard casting with resource cost.

Companion.rules_text_template: If your starting deck meets a condition, you may cast this card from outside the game.
Companion.mechanic_summary: Deckbuilding constraint that grants access to a card outside the game.

Mutate.rules_text_template: If you cast this spell for its mutate cost, put it over or under target non-Human creature. They merge into one creature with combined abilities.
Mutate.mechanic_summary: Stacks creatures together to combine abilities.

Encore.rules_text_template: {cost}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token copy for each opponent that attacks them this turn. Exile them at end of combat.
Encore.mechanic_summary: Graveyard-based token copies that attack each opponent.
tag_notes: Similar to myriad but from graveyard.
Temporary tokens but strong burst value.

Boast.rules_text_template: {cost}: Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.
tag_notes: Technically not a trigger, but functions similarly as attack-gated value.

Foretell.rules_text_template: During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card face down. On a later turn, you may cast it for its foretell cost.
Foretell.mechanic_summary: Delays casting a spell for later at a reduced or alternate cost.

Demonstrate.rules_text_template: When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you do, choose an opponent to also copy it.
Demonstrate.mechanic_summary: Copies a spell with shared benefit to an opponent.

Daybound and Nightbound.rules_text_template: Tracks day/night cycle; transforms permanents based on spells cast in previous turn.
Daybound and Nightbound.mechanic_summary: Global game state that flips permanents between two sides.
tag_notes: Tag based on front/back side effects instead.

Disturb.rules_text_template: You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its disturb cost.
Disturb.mechanic_summary: Graveyard casting that returns as a different form.
tag_notes: Similar to flashback but changes form.

Decayed.rules_text_template: This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.
Decayed.mechanic_summary: Temporary attacking creature with no blocking capability.
tag_notes: Tokens with decayed are often meant to be sacrificed or used once.

Cleave.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove words in square brackets.
Cleave.mechanic_summary: Modifies spell text for a stronger version.

Training.rules_text_template: Whenever this creature attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

Compleated.rules_text_template: You may pay 2 life for each {P} in this spell's cost. If life was paid, it enters with fewer loyalty counters.
Compleated.mechanic_summary: Allows paying life instead of mana for part of the cost.

Reconfigure.rules_text_template: {cost}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach. This permanent becomes or stops being an Equipment.
Reconfigure.mechanic_summary: Switches between being a creature and an Equipment.
tag_notes: Very flexible—functions as both threat and equipment.

Blitz.rules_text_template: If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and 'When this creature dies, draw a card,' and is sacrificed at the beginning of the next end step.
Blitz.mechanic_summary: Temporary creature with haste that replaces itself on death.
tag_notes: Works well with death and sacrifice synergies.

Casualty.rules_text_template: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature with power N or greater. If you do, copy this spell.
tag_notes: Combines spell copying with sacrifice synergy.

Enlist.rules_text_template: As this creature attacks, you may tap a nonattacking creature you control without summoning sickness. When you do, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the tapped creature's power.
Enlist.mechanic_summary: Uses other creatures to boost an attacker.
tag_notes: Converts wide board into tall pressure.
Good bridge between go_wide and go_tall.

Read Ahead.rules_text_template: As this Saga enters, choose a chapter. Start with that chapter instead of chapter I.
Read Ahead.mechanic_summary: Allows skipping to a later Saga chapter.
tag_notes: Not true selection in hand/library, but closest category.

Ravenous.rules_text_template: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card.
Ravenous.mechanic_summary: Scales with mana investment and rewards large X values.
tag_notes: Card draw is conditional but relevant.

Squad.rules_text_template: As you cast this spell, you may pay its squad cost any number of times. When it enters, create that many token copies.
Squad.mechanic_summary: Scales token copies based on additional mana paid.
tag_notes: Very similar to kicker + token scaling.

Space Sculptor.rules_text_template: This creature can block creatures with flying.
tag_notes: Too minor to tag in most cases.

Visit.rules_text_template: When this creature enters, if you control a Room, it gets an additional effect.
Visit.mechanic_summary: Conditional ETB bonus tied to Room permanents.

Prototype.rules_text_template: You may cast this spell with different mana cost, color, and stats.
Prototype.mechanic_summary: Flexible casting mode with alternate stats and cost.
tag_notes: Still best classified under cost manipulation.
